name: Socialinsider Social Media Analytics and Competitive Intelligence API
what_it_does: Socialinsider social media analytics REST API for brands and agencies to analyze social performance, benchmark competitors, and generate automated reports across Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube. Enables AI agents to manage multi-platform social analytics and KPI tracking for social performance automation, handle competitor benchmarking and industry comparison for competitive intelligence automation, access TikTok analytics and video performance tracking for short-form video intelligence automation, retrieve content performance and best posting time analysis for content strategy automation, manage white-label PDF report generation for agency client reporting automation, handle audience growth and engagement rate trending for brand health automation, access hashtag analytics and content categorization for content research automation, retrieve paid vs organic content split analysis for media mix automation, manage multi-brand workspace for agency client management automation, and integrate Socialinsider with Google Sheets, Looker Studio, and BI platforms for end-to-end social analytics automation.
use_cases: Analyzing TikTok performance from video content strategy agents
Benchmarking competitors from social intelligence agents
Generating white-label reports from agency client reporting agents
Tracking multi-platform KPIs from brand performance agents
not_for: Social publishing and scheduling (Socialinsider is analytics-only; use Buffer or Later for publishing)
Real-time social listening with sentiment analysis (use Brandwatch or Mention for listening)
Social customer care and inbox management
best_when: A marketing agency or brand wanting AI agents to automate multi-platform social analytics, TikTok competitive benchmarking, white-label client reporting, and content performance analysis through Socialinsider's analytics platform.
avoid_when: PUBLIC DATA ONLY FOR COMPETITOR ANALYSIS: Socialinsider competitor analytics relies on publicly accessible social profile data; automated competitive intelligence cannot access competitors' paid performance, audience demographics, or private metrics; automated competitive benchmarking must scope to public engagement rates, follower growth, and content frequency only. TIKTOK DATA FRESHNESS AND API DEPENDENCY: Socialinsider TikTok analytics depends on TikTok's data API availability; TikTok has historically made API access changes that affect third-party analytics tools; automated TikTok analytics workflows must monitor for TikTok API policy changes that could interrupt data collection. HISTORICAL DATA DEPTH BY SUBSCRIPTION PLAN: Socialinsider historical data availability varies by plan (Basic: 6 months, Advanced: 1 year, Custom: longer); automated trend analysis must verify historical depth for target date range; automated multi-year social performance analysis on basic plan returns truncated results without clear error.

auth.notes: Socialinsider uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Bucharest, Romania HQ. Founded 2016 by Oana Birladeanu. Bootstrapped. Products: Social analytics, competitor benchmarking, TikTok analytics, white-label reporting, Google Looker Studio connector. Platforms: Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube. GDPR. Serves agencies and brands. Competes with Iconosquare, Rival IQ, and Quintly for social analytics.

pricing.paid_tiers: Bootstrap ($82/mo), Startup ($116/mo), Company ($216/mo); custom plans for agencies; annual discount 20%
pricing.notes: Bucharest Romania. Bootstrapped. Per-profile subscription. 14-day trial. Credit card required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; analytics queries throttled by plan; historical data queries have stricter limits; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — SCHEDULED POLLING REQUIRED: Socialinsider provides no webhook push for analytics updates; automated social reporting workflows must implement polling schedules; polling too frequently wastes API quota without newer data than Socialinsider's platform data refresh cadence (typically daily)

PROFILE SLOT LIMIT BY PLAN FOR AUTOMATED TRACKING: Socialinsider plans limit the number of social profiles trackable; automated competitive monitoring expansion must verify available profile slots; automated competitor addition beyond plan slot limit creates billing upgrade requirement or blocked automated tracking

WHITE-LABEL PDF REPORT API vs DASHBOARD EXPORT: Socialinsider white-label report generation is primarily dashboard-driven; automated PDF report generation via API may have different endpoint access than dashboard reports; automated agency reporting workflows should verify API-accessible report format matches client-ready white-label output

GOOGLE LOOKER STUDIO CONNECTOR SEPARATE FROM API: Socialinsider's Google Looker Studio integration uses a separate connector framework, not the API; automated BI reporting via Looker Studio uses connector path; automated data pipeline via API uses REST endpoints; avoid mixing connector and API approaches in same automated workflow

PLATFORM API POLICY CHANGE PROPAGATION TO SOCIALINSIDER: Social platform API changes (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn) propagate to Socialinsider data availability with variable lag; automated analytics workflows must monitor Socialinsider changelog for upstream platform changes affecting metric availability; automated reports may produce N/A values for metrics affected by platform API policy changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social analytics. GDPR. API key. EU. Social performance and competitive data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social analytics. GDPR. API key. EU. Social performance data.
